name: hyperbrief-mcp
description: Hyperbrief MCP server — Phase 2 exposure of 4 tools (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query) over stdio JSON-RPC. Per Hyperbrief.md §11.1 v0.4.2 adoption-path item. Single npm dep (ajv) for schema validation; renderer pulled from sibling plugins/hyperbrief/renderers/.
